intent: Build a comprehensive e-commerce platform enabling seamless product discovery, shopping cart management, user feedback, and secure payment processing via Stripe integration.

entities.name: User Management & Authentication Service
entities.description: Handles user registration, login, session management, and role-based access control (Customers vs. Admins).

entities.name: Product Catalog Service
entities.description: Manages product listings, detailed descriptions, prices, inventory levels, and categories for discovery.

entities.name: Shopping Cart Service
entities.description: Persists selected items and quantities for logged-in users, recalculating totals dynamically before checkout.

entities.name: Payment & Order Processing (Stripe Integration)
entities.description: Orchestrates order creation, communicates with the Stripe API in test mode for secure payments, and handles webhooks for transaction status updates.

entities.name: Review & Feedback Service
entities.description: Allows registered customers to submit ratings and written reviews for purchased products, aggregating ratings for display.

entities.name: Admin Dashboard
entities.description: Provides administrative users with interfaces to manage products, monitor transaction history, and categorize inventory.

architecture.description: The system flow begins with the user accessing the responsive web platform to search and discover products. Upon authenticating, users can manage their persistent shopping cart and proceed to checkout. The checkout process securely delegates payment handling to the Stripe Integration Service in test mode. Once Stripe confirms successful payment, the system creates an order record and notifies the user. Afterward, authenticated users can submit product reviews. Administrators utilize the Admin Dashboard to manage products, categories, and review historical transactions.

validation_rules: username is required and must be unique
email must be a valid and unique email address
password must be at least 8 characters long
email is required
password is required

endpoints.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional category filtering
validation_rules: page must be an integer
limit must be an integer
category_id must be an integer if provided

endpoints.summary: Retrieve details of a specific product by ID
validation_rules: id must be an integer
name is required
price must be a positive number
inventory_quantity must be a non-negative integer

endpoints.summary: Update an existing product's details (Admin only)
validation_rules: id must be an integer
price must be a positive number if provided
inventory_quantity must be a non-negative integer if provided

endpoints.summary: Retrieve the active user's current shopping cart and dynamic total calculation
Add an item to the user's cart or update its quantity
validation_rules: product_id must be a valid product ID
quantity must be an integer greater than 0

endpoints.summary: Remove a specific item from the user's cart
validation_rules: id must be an integer

endpoints.summary: Initiate order creation and retrieve Stripe client secret for payment
Handle Stripe webhook events for secure transaction status updates
validation_rules: Stripe-Signature header must be present and valid

endpoints.summary: Retrieve past order history for authenticated user or list all orders for Admin
Submit rating and review for a purchased product
validation_rules: id must be an integer
rating must be an integer between 1 and 5
comment must be a string if provided

endpoints.summary: Retrieve and aggregate reviews for a specific product
validation_rules: id must be an integer

components.content: Discover our curated collection of premium products

rules.description: Ensure inventory availability before allowing items to be added to the shopping cart or purchased during checkout.
rules.logic: IF requested_quantity > product.inventory_level THEN reject_action WITH error("Requested quantity exceeds available inventory") ELSE allow_action

rules.description: Restrict product review submissions to authenticated customers who have a confirmed and completed order for that specific product.
rules.logic: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id WHERE orders.customer_id = current_user.id AND order_items.product_id = target_product_id AND orders.status = 'Completed') THEN reject_action WITH error("Review allowed only for purchased products")

rules.description: Transition order payment state to 'Paid' and trigger fulfillment only upon secure verification of a successful Stripe webhook payment event.
rules.logic: IF webhook_signature_is_valid AND webhook.event == 'payment_intent.succeeded' THEN SET order.payment_status = 'Paid' AND SET order.fulfillment_status = 'Processing' ELSE IF webhook.event == 'payment_intent.payment_failed' THEN SET order.payment_status = 'Failed'

rules.description: Enforce strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) ensuring only validated Admin accounts can perform write operations on the product catalog and access overall transaction history.
rules.logic: IF request.action IN ('createProduct', 'updateProduct', 'deleteProduct', 'viewTransactionLogs') AND current_user.role != 'Admin' THEN reject_action WITH error("Unauthorized: Administrative privileges required")

rules.description: Recalculate the shopping cart's total dynamically to match updated product prices, and purge invalid/out-of-stock items before allowing transition to checkout.
rules.logic: FOR EACH item IN cart DO FETCH current_price, current_inventory FROM Product_Catalog_Service; IF current_inventory < item.quantity THEN SET item.quantity = current_inventory; UPDATE cart.total_amount = SUM(item.quantity * current_price)
